recommended.text: Sixty builders, one weekend, demos you can open — a look back at the Acme Cosmos beta.

variant_a.text: The Acme Cosmos beta in one frame: sixty builders and a wall of openable demos.

variant_b.text: What a weekend of building looks like at Acme Cosmos. Sixty demos, all openable.
